title: Slide manifest
description: Per-target, fully-resolved render input. One manifest per output_target — produced by lib/slide_manifest_builder.py from regions + article + design_system + images, consumed by WeasyprintCompose (and future HtmlInteractiveCompose / PresentationsAdapter). Granularity is per-SPREAD (9 entries for editorial-16page): a feature-spread occupies one entry with regions spanning both pages in spread-local rect_norm. rect_norm is target-invariant; rect_px is precomputed at the chosen page_size. Text is locale-resolved (one language per manifest). Typography font_family chains are already resolved. Lives at output/<slug>/manifests/<target>.manifest.json.

built_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the builder produced this manifest.

builder_version.description: Optional. Version of lib/slide_manifest_builder.py that produced this.

locale.description: Which language this manifest is rendered in. 'en' / 'zh' / etc.

brand_authenticity.description: Resolved from design-system.yaml. Realizers must surface these gates in their own QA passes.

text_safe_default_rule.description: Resolved from design_system.text_safe_contracts.default_rule. Applies to any region with text_safe_required=true that has no per-region override.

claim_spine_ref.description: Path to the claim_spine artifact this manifest was built against (relative to issue dir). Null when claim_spine is absent from article.

dpi.description: Resolution used to convert between mm and px. Defaults to 96 for screen; print typically uses 300.

family_chain.description: Fully resolved font fallback chain. First entry is desired_family; subsequent entries are fallbacks for when the desired font is unavailable at render time.

color.description: RGB or RGBA hex. CMYK conversion is the realizer's job.

pages_per_instance.description: 1 for cover / back-cover / single-page spreads; 2 for facing-page spreads. Determines aspect of this slide's canvas before regions are drawn.

page_indices.description: Page numbers within the magazine this slide occupies. E.g. [4, 5] for a spread on pages 4 and 5.

rect_norm.description: [x0, y0, x1, y1] in slide-local 0..1 coordinates where (0,0) is top-left of the spread canvas (full spread including both pages when pages_per_instance == 2).

rect_px.description: [x0, y0, x1, y1] in px, precomputed for the chosen page_size. Cache only — realizers can recompute from rect_norm and the canvas if they need different DPI.

text.description: Locale-resolved text content. Only meaningful when role=text.

component.description: Component name from library/components/registry.yaml when role=text (Title / BodyWithDropCap / Kicker / PullQuote / etc.). Realizers may ignore this and just use typography + text; HTML interactive uses it for editable hooks.

component_props.description: Component-specific props from registry.yaml (drop_cap, hyphenate, align, columns, etc.).

text_safe_rule.description: Per-region override of design_tokens text_safe rule. When absent, inherit from top-level text_safe_default_rule.

bind_field.description: Optional. Path back to the field in article.yaml whose value this region renders (e.g. 'spread_copy[2].title.en' or 'cover_line.en'). Lets HTML interactive realizer round-trip edits back to source-of-truth.

claim_role.description: Which role this region plays in the claim_spine. Optional. Lets scorer / a11y / future tooling navigate claim structure from the manifest alone.

source_path.description: Path relative to the issue dir (e.g. 'images/spread-03/feature_hero.png').

crop_rect_norm.description: Rectangle in source image coordinates to use. Defaults to the whole image.

fit_mode.description: How the cropped source fills the region's rect_norm. CSS object-fit semantics.

natural_aspect.description: Aspect of the source image, e.g. '3:4'. Used by realizers to pick crops or fallbacks.

asset_provenance.description: How this image was obtained (e.g. 'codex.image_gen 2026-05-13', 'user-provided', 'vertex-gemini-3-pro-image upscale').
